kubectl run persona-social-login -n personas --rm -i --restart=Never --image=curlimages/curl:8.8.0 --command -- sh -lc 'curl -sS -X POST https://api.example-social.test/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json" -d "{\"username\":\"artisanal_outreach\",\"password\":\"S3cure!Passw0rd\"}"'

kubectl run persona-social-register -n personas --rm -i --restart=Never --image=curlimages/curl:8.8.0 --command -- sh -lc 'curl -sS -X POST https://api.example-social.test/v1/users/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json" -d "{\"username\":\"artisanal_outreach\",\"email\":\"artisanal.outreach@example-mail.test\",\"password\":\"S3cure!Passw0rd\",\"profile\":{\"display_name\":\"A. Outreach\",\"bio\":\"Cloud-native tinkerer and OSS enthusiast\"}}"'
